name: Export Drawback on Distilled Spirits and Wines

eligibility.description: Available to manufacturers, producers, or bottlers who export distilled spirits or wines in casks, bulk containers, or bottles, provided the spirits are marked especially for export and a claim is filed.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for a 'drawback' (refund) of internal revenue taxes paid on distilled spirits or wines that are subsequently exported from the United States.
